summary.json_mode: 10/13 ✅ (glm-5p2, qwen3p7-plus, deepseek-v4-pro output thinking prefix before JSON)
summary.overall_status: All 13 models operational. claude-sonnet-4-6 has 0 active keys.

mistral-medium.notes: Fastest (1.4s). Strong reasoning. Best Mistral model.

mistral-nemo.notes: Good value (12B, $0.15/$0.15). No markdown wrapping in code.

codestral.notes: Code-specialist (22B). 256K context. Fast (1.2s). Best for code tasks.

ministral-8b.notes: Smallest model (8B). Fast (2.5s). Good for simple tasks. Edge-ready.

command-a.notes: Cohere flagship. 256K context. Web search capable. Good for RAG.

command-r7b.notes: Smallest Cohere (7B). Very cheap ($0.0375/$0.15). Fast (2.3s). Returns Cohere native format.

command-r-plus.notes: 104B MoE. Strong reasoning. Returns Cohere native format (needs client-side parsing).

llama-3.3-70b.notes: Meta 70B via SambaNova. FREE. Fast (2s). Good type hints in code. Best free option.

json.response: Outputs thinking process before JSON. JSON is embedded but not standalone.

glm-5p2.notes: Reasoning model (shows thinking). 131K context. 6.5s latency. Needs prompt eng to get clean JSON.

kimi-k2p7-code.notes: 1T MoE code specialist. Shows brief reasoning. 32K context limit. Good JSON compliance.

json.response: Outputs thinking prefix. JSON embedded but not standalone.

qwen3p7-plus.notes: Reasoning model. Only 4K context (!). Cheapest Fireworks ($0.40/$1.60). Needs prompt eng.

json.response: JSON starts but truncated by thinking prefix.

deepseek-v4-pro.notes: Reasoning model. 131K context. Shows chain-of-thought. Good for complex reasoning tasks.

key_findings.reasoning_models: glm-5p2, qwen3p7-plus, deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2p7-code (show thinking process)
key_findings.json_compliance_issue: Reasoning models (glm-5p2, qwen3p7-plus, deepseek-v4-pro) prepend thinking to JSON output. Need 'No thinking, just output JSON' prompt.
key_findings.cohere_format_note: command-r7b and command-r-plus return Cohere native format (message.content is array of {type, text}) instead of OpenAI format (message.content is string). Gateway should normalize.
key_findings.claude_issue: claude-sonnet-4-6 has 0 active keys — not testable. Cookie-based auth not configured.

recommendations: Add prompt engineering for reasoning models: 'Do not show your thinking. Output only the final answer.'
Normalize Cohere response format to OpenAI-compatible in the gateway
Increase qwen3p7-plus context from 4K — likely a configuration error, should be 131K+
Add cookie-based keys for claude-sonnet-4-6 to enable testing
Consider load balancing across the 10 Fireworks keys for better throughput
